info.title: MailerMine API
info.description: MailerMine API — send email and manage projects, API keys, domains, templates, contacts, audiences, and delivery data.

tags.name: Emails
tags.description: Send transactional email with attachments, CC/BCC, headers, tags, and metadata.

tags.name: Messages
tags.description: List messages, retrieve delivery details, and inspect lifecycle events.

tags.name: Projects
tags.description: Manage workspace projects and project settings.

tags.name: API Keys
tags.description: Create, scope, rotate, and revoke project API keys.

tags.name: Domains
tags.description: Manage sending domains, DNS records, and verification.

tags.name: Templates
tags.description: Create, preview, duplicate, and test reusable email templates.

tags.name: Marketing
tags.description: Manage reusable marketing data definitions such as contact custom fields.

tags.name: Contacts
tags.description: Create, filter, update, delete, and restore marketing contacts.

tags.name: Lists
tags.description: Manage static contact lists and list memberships.

tags.name: Segments
tags.description: Manage dynamic, rule-based contact segments.

tags.name: Audiences
tags.description: Read the unified list-and-segment audience catalog.

tags.name: Tags
tags.description: Organize contacts with reusable project tags.

tags.name: Imports
tags.description: Upload, configure, queue, and monitor contact imports.

tags.name: Exports
tags.description: Queue, monitor, and download filtered contact exports.

tags.name: Campaigns
tags.description: Build and manage project-scoped marketing campaigns.

tags.name: Campaign Lifecycle
tags.description: Schedule and transition campaigns through asynchronous delivery states.

tags.name: Campaign Analytics
tags.description: Inspect campaign delivery, engagement, and tracked-link metrics.

tags.name: Campaign Events
tags.description: Inspect campaign activities, recipients, and delivery timelines.

tags.name: Analytics
tags.description: Aggregate delivery, engagement, provider, domain, and project reporting.

tags.name: Events
tags.description: Query recipient delivery and engagement events across the project.

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Register endpoints, manage subscriptions, and inspect signed event deliveries.

tags.name: Suppressions
tags.description: Manage suppressed recipient addresses that are skipped when sending.

get.description: Return the top campaigns by volume with open and click rates. Required scope: `analytics.read`.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Range start (ISO-8601). Defaults to 30 days ago.

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: Requests remaining in the current window.

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Unix timestamp when the current window resets.

get.x-scope-enforcement: Scopes are declared for forward compatibility; runtime enforcement is being rolled out.

bearerAuth.description: Project-scoped API key. Prefix: `mm_live_...`. Header: `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>`.

to.description: Recipient email address(es). A single string is accepted for backward compatibility.

template_id.description: Template UUID to render instead of inline content.

subject.description: Email subject. Required when not using a template.

html.description: HTML body. Required with `text` when not using a template.

text.description: Plain text body. Required with `html` when not using a template.

metadata.description: Custom metadata stored with the message.

tags.description: Tags for filtering and analytics.

html.description: HTML body; required when no other body field is provided.

tags.description: Searchable labels.

branding.description: Branding, layout, colors, and footer settings.

tags.description: Replacement labels.

name.description: Name for the copy; generated when omitted.

variables.description: Runtime values used to render placeholders.

to.description: Recipient email for the test send.

slug.description: Lowercase kebab-case slug; generated when omitted.

expires_at.description: Future expiration time; omit for no expiry.

scopes.description: Granted API scopes; null means full legacy access.

expires_at.description: Future expiration time; null clears expiry.

scopes.description: Replacement scope list; null restores full legacy access.

email.description: Unique email address within the project.

tag_names.description: Tag names to resolve or create.

custom_fields.description: Custom values keyed by field slug.

items.description: A single condition (`field`, `operator`, `value`) or a nested rule group.

field.description: Contact attribute or custom field key.

value.description: Comparison value. Type depends on the field and operator.

url.description: HTTPS URL that will receive signed event deliveries.

is_active.description: Whether the endpoint is active on creation. Defaults to true.

subscribed_events.description: Replacement set of subscribed event types.

event_type.description: Event type to simulate. Defaults to a generic test event when omitted.

failed_only.description: Replay only failed deliveries in the range.

from.description: Replay deliveries created on or after this ISO-8601 date.

to.description: Replay deliveries created on or before this ISO-8601 date.

event_types.description: Restrict replay to these event types.

delivery_ids.description: Replay these specific delivery UUIDs. Overrides range filters.

domains.description: Sending domain volume, ordered by count descending (top 50).

open_rate.description: Unique opens / delivered as a percentage.

ctr.description: Click-through rate: clicks / delivered as a percentage.

ctor.description: Click-to-open rate: clicks / opens as a percentage.

emailsSent.description: Total emails sent in the selected range.

campaigns.description: Number of campaigns that sent in the selected range.

openRate.description: Unique opens / delivered as a percentage.

clickRate.description: Unique clicks / delivered as a percentage.

projects.description: Project metrics for the authenticated project.

note.description: Present when multiple projects are requested with a single-project key.

providers.description: Provider volume, ordered by count descending.

scopes.description: Granted scopes; null means full legacy access. @var list<string>|null

expires_at.description: Expiration time; null means no expiry. @format date-time

secret.description: One-time plaintext secret, returned only on create/rotate. @example mm_live_secret

key.description: Backward-compatible alias of secret, returned only on create/rotate.

id.description: Public list or segment UUID. @format uuid

member_count.description: Current list size or last evaluated segment size. @example 1250

tag_ids.description: Tag UUIDs to assign or remove.

status.description: Status applied to every selected contact.

deliveryRate.description: Delivered divided by recipients or sent, as a percentage. @example 98.4

openRate.description: Unique opens divided by delivered, as a percentage. @example 48.2

clickRate.description: Unique clicks divided by delivered, as a percentage. @example 12.7

bounceRate.description: Bounces divided by recipients or sent, as a percentage.

complaintRate.description: Complaints divided by recipients or sent, as a percentage.

averageDeliveryTimeSeconds.description: Mean provider delivery latency in seconds.

event_type.description: Delivery or engagement event type. @example clicked

message_uuid.description: Related message UUID when loaded. @format uuid

ctr.description: Unique click-through rate against delivered messages.

failure_reason.description: Failure detail, present for failed recipients.

contact.description: Contact snapshot. @var array{uuid: string, email: string, full_name: string}|null

message.description: Generated transactional message. @var array{uuid: string, status: string, status_label: string, error_message: string|null}|null

sample_contacts.description: Up to ten representative matching contacts. @var list<array<string, mixed>>

warnings.description: Audience warnings discovered during preview. @var list<string>

name.description: Campaign display name. @example August product newsletter

subject.description: Email subject after campaign configuration. @example What is new in August

send_immediately.description: Whether delivery is configured as immediate.

project.description: Owning project relationship. @var array{uuid: string, name: string}|null

template.description: Selected template relationship. @var array{uuid: string, name: string, subject: string|null}|null

segment.description: Selected audience segment relationship. @var array{uuid: string, name: string, contact_count: int}|null

payload.description: Provider or recipient failure details. @var array<string, mixed>|null

subscribed.description: Whether the contact is subscribed to marketing email. @example true

tags.description: Loaded tag relationships. @var list<array{id: string, name: string, color: string}>

lists.description: Loaded list relationships. @var list<array{id: string, name: string}>

custom_fields.description: Custom field values keyed by field slug. @var array<string, mixed>

items.description: A single condition (`field`, `operator`, `value`) or a nested rule group.

field.description: Contact attribute or custom field key.

value.description: Comparison value. Type depends on the field and operator.

slug.description: Stable value key used in contact payloads. @example company

required.description: Whether imports and writes require a value. @example false

options.description: Allowed choices for select fields. @var list<mixed>|null

priority.description: Optional provider priority, primarily for MX records. @example 10

project.description: Present when project relation is loaded.

mail_from.description: MAIL FROM domain; present on detailed responses.

dmarc_recommendation.description: Recommended DMARC record. @var array{type: string, name: string, value: string, note: string}|null

dns_summary.description: Aggregate status by purpose. @var array{verification: string, spf: string, dkim: string}|null

project.description: Parent project summary. @var array{id: string, name: string}|null

include_schedule.description: Copy delivery timing into the draft duplicate.

contact_count.description: Number of contacts written to the export. @example 1250

filters.description: Filters captured when the export was queued. @var array<string, mixed>

download_url.description: Download URL, available only after completion. @format uri

metadata.description: Parser suggestions, parse details, and saved configuration. @var array<string, mixed>

counters.description: Row and batch counters. @var array{rows_total: int, rows_imported: int, rows_updated: int, rows_failed: int, rows_skipped: int, current_batch: int, total_batches: int}

has_failures.description: Whether a downloadable failure CSV exists. @example false

metadata.description: Parser suggestions, parse details, and saved configuration. @var array<string, mixed>

counters.description: Row and batch counters. @var array{rows_total: int, rows_imported: int, rows_updated: int, rows_failed: int, rows_skipped: int, current_batch: int, total_batches: int}

has_failures.description: Whether a downloadable failure CSV exists. @example false

progress_payload.description: Live processing metrics for polling clients.

speed_per_minute.description: Processing speed in rows per minute.

ids.description: Contact UUIDs to add or remove.

description.description: Optional list description. @example Customers subscribed to product updates

headers.description: Custom headers applied to the message.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata stored with the message.

tags.description: Tags for filtering and analytics.

variables.description: Runtime values used to render placeholders.

description.description: Optional project description. @example Customer-facing transactional email

email_count.description: Number of messages in the project. @example 1240

send_immediately.description: Mark ready for immediate sending instead of scheduling.

scheduled_at.description: Required when `send_immediately` is false. ISO-8601 date-time interpreted in `timezone`.

rules.description: Normalized dynamic membership rules. @var array<string, mixed>

metadata.description: Additional context captured with the suppression.

restored_at.description: Time the suppression was restored (ISO-8601), or `null` if active.

usage_count.description: Number of contacts using the tag. @example 42

tags.description: Searchable labels. @var list<string>

html.description: HTML body; present on detailed responses.

text.description: Plain-text body; present on detailed responses.

branding.description: Branding and layout configuration. @var array<string, mixed>|null

metadata.description: Derived category, type, preview text, and tags. @var array<string, mixed>|null

project.description: Parent project summary. @var array{id: string, name: string}|null

usage.description: Campaign usage counters. @var array{campaigns: int, scheduled_campaigns: int}|null

name.description: Variable identifier used in `{{name}}` placeholders. @example first_name

required.description: Whether callers must provide a value. @example true

template_uuid.description: Published template UUID; empty string clears it.

segment_uuid.description: Audience segment UUID; empty string clears it.

scheduled_at.description: Scheduled date/time interpreted in `timezone`. ISO-8601 with offset.

items.description: A single condition (`field`, `operator`, `value`) or a nested rule group.

field.description: Contact attribute or custom field key.

value.description: Comparison value. Type depends on the field and operator.

url.description: HTTPS URL that receives signed event deliveries.

is_active.description: Whether the endpoint is currently active.

enabled.description: Alias of `is_active` retained for backward compatibility.

subscribed_events.description:
Subscribed event types. Values match the webhook event catalog
(for example `email.delivered`, `email.bounced`, `campaign.completed`).

retry_policy.description: Automatic retry policy applied to failed deliveries.

last_delivery.description: Most recent delivery summary, or `null` when no deliveries exist yet.

project.description: Owning project summary. Present when the project relation is loaded.

event_type.description: Event type that triggered the delivery (for example `email.delivered`).

http_status.description: HTTP status code returned by the endpoint, or `null` if not yet attempted.

response_headers.description: Response headers returned by the endpoint.

response_body.description: Truncated response body returned by the endpoint.

request_body.description: Signed JSON payload that was sent to the endpoint.

next_retry_at.description: Scheduled time of the next retry (ISO-8601), or `null`.

webhook.description: Owning webhook summary. Present when the webhook relation is loaded.

message.description: Related message summary, when the delivery is tied to a message.

url.description: HTTPS URL that receives signed event deliveries.

is_active.description: Whether the endpoint is currently active.

enabled.description: Alias of `is_active` retained for backward compatibility.

subscribed_events.description:
Subscribed event types. Values match the webhook event catalog
(for example `email.delivered`, `email.bounced`, `campaign.completed`).

retry_policy.description: Automatic retry policy applied to failed deliveries.

last_delivery.description: Most recent delivery summary, or `null` when no deliveries exist yet.

project.description: Owning project summary. Present when the project relation is loaded.

signing_secret.description:
HMAC signing secret. Returned only when creating a webhook or rotating
its secret — store it securely, it is never shown again.

Forbidden.description: Account suspended, feature denied, or cross-project access blocked.

ValidationError.description: Validation failed or plan limit exceeded.

RateLimited.description: Rate limit exceeded. Retry after the `Retry-After` header value.
